text: 🛠️ [ISSUE-101] Laravel 11 Backend setup complete. Configured Sanctum auth and MySQL database driver.
🛠️ [ISSUE-104] Enforced multi-tenant global scoping on `Organization` model and Sanctum middleware. Session-derived tenant scope verified.
🛠️ [ISSUE-202] Ticket RESTful API endpoints implemented with filtering, sorting, and full-text search capability.
🛠️ [ISSUE-303] React 19 Dashboard UI assembled with Tailwind Glassmorphism design system.
🛠️ [ISSUE-406] One-command Docker Compose setup finalized. Health checks and Nginx reverse proxy operational.
